title: goniophlebium nummularium
intro: Goniophlebium nummularium, also known as the coin-leaf polypody, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium nummularium include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Goniophlebium nummularium can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
